dev.jeka.core.api.utils

Class JkUtilsObject

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsObject

  • public final class JkUtilsObject
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class for dealing with generic Object class instances.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      JkUtilsObject() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static <T> void copyNonNullPublicFieldsInto(T source, T overrider)
      Copies non null public instance fields for specified overrider instance into the specified source one.
      static boolean equals(java.lang.Object object1, java.lang.Object object2)
      Returns true if both object are null or the two objects are equals.
      static <T> T firstNonNull(T... items)
      Returns the objects of the specified array that is not null.
      static int hashCode(java.lang.Object object)
      Returns the hash code of the specified object or 0 if it's null.
      static java.lang.String toString(java.lang.Object object)
      Null safe for Object.toString().
      static <T extends java.lang.Enum<T>>
      T      		 valueOfEnum(java.lang.Class<T> enumType, java.lang.String name) 

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • JkUtilsObject

        public JkUtilsObject()

    • Method Detail

      • firstNonNull

        public static <T> T firstNonNull(T... items)
        Returns the objects of the specified array that is not null. Throw an IllegalArgumentException if all array elements are null or the specified array is empty.

      • equals

        public static boolean equals(java.lang.Object object1,
                             java.lang.Object object2)
        Returns true if both object are null or the two objects are equals. Returns false otherwise.

      • hashCode

        public static int hashCode(java.lang.Object object)
        Returns the hash code of the specified object or 0 if it's null.

      • toString

        public static java.lang.String toString(java.lang.Object object)
        Null safe for Object.toString(). If the specified object is null than this method returns "null".

      • valueOfEnum

        public static <T extends java.lang.Enum<T>> T valueOfEnum(java.lang.Class<T> enumType,
                                                          java.lang.String name)

      • copyNonNullPublicFieldsInto

        public static <T> void copyNonNullPublicFieldsInto(T source,
                                                   T overrider)
        Copies non null public instance fields for specified overrider instance into the specified source one. The copy is recursive for fields which have themselves public instance fields.
